name: libregexp-ipv6-perl
title: libregexp-ipv6-perl
description:
Regular expression for IPv6 addresses
Regexp::IPv6 exports the $IPv6_re regular expression that matches any valid
IPv6 address as described in "RFC 2373 - 2.2 Text Representation of
Addresses" but ::. Any string not compliant with such RFC will be rejected.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libregexp-ipv6-perl because Regular expression for IPv6 addresses.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libregexp-ipv6-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libregexp-ipv6-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libregexp-ipv6-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
